_comment: USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Verify cloud prices against current provider pricing before relying on them. Local/ollama = $0 (your electricity only).

gpt-4o-mini.note: OpenAI list, verify — used in the metered cloud slice

gpt-5.5.note: run via a ChatGPT SUBSCRIPTION (codex), not the metered API — tokens read 0 here; set API list price if metering it

models._cloud_equiv_note: Cloud-EQUIVALENT prices, keyed by the ledger's model name (colon form), read by priceRunCloud() for the local-vs-cloud routing economics table. These are what it would cost to run the SAME OSS model on a hosted endpoint (OpenRouter) instead of your own box — approximate, VERIFY before relying on them.

_adapterModel_note: Maps each adapter to the model it ACTUALLY runs here. hermes/openclaw/pi/goose are all wired to the same local Ollama qwen3:8b as the ollama adapter, so they price to $0 — the benchmark isolates the harness, not the model. Only claude runs a cloud model.

infra._comment: Monthly $ to KEEP A NODE RUNNING. Amortized per-run in cost.js if you set runsPerMonth.

vps-hetzner-cx22.note: 2 vCPU / 4GB — runs OpenClaw/Hermes gateway + ollama small models

modal-serverless.note: hibernates idle; pay per-second of compute only (Hermes modal/daytona backend)

gpu-rtx4090-rented.note: ~$0.44/hr if you need a real local LLM at speed
